name: Varex
description_short: Varex Federal Credit Union is a member-owned financial institution serving employees of Varex Imaging Corporation in Salt Lake City, offering savings accounts, loans, and e-services with NCUA insurance.
description_long: Varex Federal Credit Union is a federally chartered credit union serving the workforce of Varex Imaging Corporation, with a physical branch located on the south end of the company's Salt Lake plant in Salt Lake City, Utah. As a member-owned, not-for-profit institution, it operates under NCUA (National Credit Union Administration) federal insurance, providing members with deposit protection up to at least $250,000. The credit union has been established to provide accessible financial services to its membership base, with leadership including President/CEO Tammy Phillips. Varex Federal Credit Union offers a range of consumer and member financial products, including share savings accounts, share certificates, personal loans, credit cards, debit cards, and e-banking services through their Flex-Teller online platform. The institution distinguishes itself through personalized service with dedicated staff contacts for different member needs—loan officers, account specialists, and youth banking coordinators—and maintains accessible branch hours with extended Friday service until 5:00 PM. Additionally, members have access to CO-OP Shared Branch network locations beyond the primary branch, expanding convenience across multiple locations. The credit union represents a traditional member-focused alternative to commercial banks, emphasizing direct relationships and employee-centric financial solutions rather than profit maximization, though as a smaller, employer-affiliated institution, it may have more limited product offerings and geographic reach compared to larger financial institutions.
services: Lost or stolen card reporting services
pros: NCUA federal insurance protection for savings up to at least $250,000
Member-owned, not-for-profit structure means profits returned to members rather than shareholders
Dedicated loan department with direct contact email for inquiries
Extended Friday hours until 5:00 PM for working members
Access to CO-OP Shared Branch network for services beyond the primary location
Multiple contact methods including phone, fax, text, and email for member support
Youth banking program (Kids Klub) with dedicated coordinator
cons: Limited to single physical branch location in Salt Lake City, Utah
Employer-affiliated membership may restrict eligibility to Varex Imaging Corporation employees and families
Website navigation issues with broken internal links suggest limited digital infrastructure
No clear information available regarding specific loan types, rates, or product details from contact page
Closed Sundays and Saturdays with daily lunch closure may inconvenience some members
best_for: Varex Imaging Corporation employees seeking employer-affiliated financial services
Members prioritizing NCUA-insured savings and member-owned institution values
Salt Lake City-area residents with access to CO-OP Shared Branch network
diagnosis: Varex Federal Credit Union is best suited for Varex Imaging Corporation employees and their families seeking member-owned financial services with NCUA insurance and personalized service. The main caveat is that membership appears to be employer-affiliated and geographically limited to a single Salt Lake City location, with limited digital presence making it challenging to assess full product offerings and rates online.
typical_results_timeline: Membership approval and account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions are usually faster than traditional banks.
